# growthbook_dashboard (Data Source)

Look up an existing GrowthBook dashboard by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Unique dashboard identifier.

### Read-Only

- `blocks` (Attributes List) Dashboard blocks. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--blocks))
- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `edit_level` (String) Edit level.
- `enable_auto_updates` (Boolean) Whether auto-updates are enabled.
- `experiment_id` (String) Parent experiment ID.
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether this is the default dashboard.
- `organization` (String) Owning organization ID.
- `projects` (List of String) Project IDs.
- `share_level` (String) Share level.
- `title` (String) Display name.
- `uid` (String) Public dashboard UID.
- `update_schedule` (Attributes) Automatic refresh schedule. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--update_schedule))
- `user_id` (String) Creator user ID.

<a id="nestedatt--blocks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `blocks`

Read-Only:

- `content` (String) Markdown content.
- `description` (String) Block description.
- `experiment_id` (String) Experiment ID.
- `layout` (Attributes) Block position on the grid. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--blocks--layout))
- `metric_ids` (List of String) Metric IDs.
- `snapshot_id` (String) Associated snapshot ID.
- `title` (String) Block title.
- `type` (String) Block type.
- `variation_ids` (List of String) Variation IDs.

<a id="nestedatt--blocks--layout"></a>
### Nested Schema for `blocks.layout`

Read-Only:

- `h` (Number) Height in rows.
- `static` (Boolean) Whether the block is fixed.
- `w` (Number) Width in columns.
- `x` (Number) Column position.
- `y` (Number) Row position.



<a id="nestedatt--update_schedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `update_schedule`

Read-Only:

- `cron` (String) Cron expression.
- `hours` (Number) Staleness threshold in hours.
- `type` (String) Schedule type.
